texto: Over the years, numerous times, too many times to count, just as I was about to reach my breaking point, just when I thought I couldn't take another minute, another second, out of nowhere-at the grocery store, at the park, at restaurants-angels, Ethan's angels, would appear and save us: strangers in stores would stop to talk to Ethan; neighbors took him for a walk...
explicacao: Citação de Jim Kokoris sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Over the years, numerous times, too many times to count, just as I was about to reach my breaking…” articula tempo, angels, autism em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como autism.
